3270740.name: Hellfire Rampage VR Demo
3270740.description:
An urgent mission awaits for you!

Enemy portals are targeting our home, and an invasion is imminent.

Your task is to travel to key enemy locations, defeat their forces, and stop their invasion plans.

Experience an intense 25-minute raid through x7 unique locations, each with its own challenges.

From deep underground pits and quicksand arenas to the towering heights of an eagle's nest,

all the way to another planet and even an abyssal dimension.

Face off against infernals like hellhounds, imps, demons, skeletons, giant toxic moths, and crazed ravens.

Grab your best weapons, fight your way through, and emerge victorious—or fall on the battlefield.

The fate of your land depends on you - join the fight now!
3270740.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
